prediction.reasoning: Based on AON's historical volatility of approximately 20-25% annually, I estimated an 18-day standard deviation of around 2.5%. The point estimate assumes modest upward drift typical of large-cap stocks. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with widening ranges to reflect increasing uncertainty over the 18-day horizon.
